description: In the marketing operations guide, move the complete `### Launch Event Planning` subsection from under `## Marketing` to under `## Events`, placing it after the complete `### Conference Planning` subsection and before `### Venue Checklist`. Preserve the moved subsection exactly, including its table, checklist, and fenced archive snippet. Leave the `### Launch Event Planning Exceptions` decoy heading and the fenced archive mention of `### Launch Event Planning` untouched.
